title: ليلة الغضب الأهلاوي.. هجوم من المدرجات.. وهاشتاج "الخطيب ضيع الأهلي" يتصدر "إكس"
summary: انتفضت جماهيرالأهلي ضد الفريق الأول لكرة القدم ومجلس إدارة النادي، برئاسة محمود الخطيب، في سابقة نادرة، وعبّرت عن غضبها في مدرجات ستاد الدفاع الجوي.

title: "سابقة نادرة الحدوث".. جماهير الأهلي تحتج على أداء الفريق بالتصفيق بعد هدف بيراميدز
summary: أقدمت جماهير الأهلي على تصرف نادر الحدوث، بعدما مُني مرمى الفريق بهدف أمام بيراميدز، في مشهد جاء ضمن احتجاجات حادة وجهتها للاعبين والإدارة.

title: "روح يا بيبو".. جماهير أهلاوية تهاجم الخطيب وتطالب برحيله مع المجلس (فيديو)
summary: وجّهت بعض جماهير الأهلي هجومًا حادًا على مجلس إدارة النادي، برئاسة محمود الخطيب، عقب الخسارة أمام بيراميدز بثلاثية نظيفة.

title: حالة من الصمت.. يلا كورة يكشف أجواء غرفة ملابس الأهلي بعد الخسارة من بيراميدز
summary: شهدت أروقة غرفة ملابس النادي الأهلي حالة من الصمت، بعد الخسارة الصعبة التي تلقاها الفريق أمام بيراميدز، في إطار مواجهات الجولة الرابعة من مرحلة التتويج.

title: Lady Gaga and Doechii Serve Sass and High Fashion in ‘Runway’ Music Video

title: Gerry Conway, Marvel Comics Writer Who Created Punisher, Ms. Marvel and More, Dies at 73
summary: Gerry Conway, a writer for Marvel Comics who created the Punisher, Ms. Marvel and other famous characters, has died, Marvel announced Monday. He was 73. “Gerry Conway was a gifted writer. He was thoughtful, deeply attuned to the emotional and moral core of storytelling, and a wonderful and articula…

title: vivo Y600 Pro arrives with 10,200mAh Si-C battery and Dimensity 7300e
summary: In just two generations, vivo has nearly doubled the battery capacity of its Y-series Pro smartphones. The Y400 Pro, which launched last June, arrived with a 5,500mAh battery, which is pretty average for midrangers these days. The Y500 Pro followed in November with a significant bump up to 7,000mAh…

title: Valve Steam Controller review: Every input to PC game from the sofa
summary: Valve's Steam Controller ($99) is vastly customizable, comfortable, and has a ton of input options. You probably don't strictly need it, but you can make it your own.

summary: Samsung is widely expected to unveil the Galaxy Z Fold8 and Galaxy Z Flip8 later this year. A third foldable with a wider aspect ratio, possibly called the Galaxy Z Fold8 Wide or simply Z Fold Wide, is also rumored to launch alongside them. title: AMD Ryzen 5 7600X3D review: An unbeatable value gaming CPU
summary: The Ryzen 5 7600X3D is easily the best value in gaming CPUs right now, even 18 months after it was released. Outside of games, however, it loses some ground, particularly to Intel’s recent competition, which has made strides in both gaming and productivity.

title: Disabled gamer prototypes true one-handed keyboard-and-mouse controller, device nominated for award — maker inspired to build device after losing right arm in an accident
summary: A Redditor who lost their right arm in an accident decided to prototype and build their own single-handed controller to get back into gaming. This peripheral combines a mouse and keypad into a single ergonomic device for one-handed use of PCs and consoles.

title: Enthusiast builds 3D-printed retro PC case and shares the files so you can print it yourself — design fits ITX mobo and ATX PSU, comes with front 3.5-inch bay for USB ports
summary: You finish building this 3D-printed retro PC case in under 100 hours as long as you have all the right tools and materials. u/Potatozeng even included a PDF guide (with pictures!) to help you through the process.

title: Turtle Beach's new mouse has a 2.25-inch touchscreen and hotswap batteries that last 15 hours apiece — 'MC7' costs $160, part of company's new Command Series peripheral lineup
summary: Turtle Beach's new Command Series of peripherals features a lot of screens, and the most interesting implementation is seen in the MC7 mouse. The 2.25-inch LCD rests where your thumb will, while providing macros or glanceable information like your PC stats. The mouse otherwise has cutting-edge spec…

title: Steam Controller leaked review points to $99 MSRP — more expensive than PS5 and Xbox controllers and Nintendo Joy-Cons
summary: A hardware reviewer accidentally made their review video go live on YouTube before the embargo date, revealing the pricing for the Steam Controller.

title: Intel Core Ultra 7 270K Plus vs AMD Ryzen 7 7800X3D — Can Intel finally beat X3D?
summary: Intel's new Core Ultra 7 270K Plus is a productivity beast, but can it hang with the Ryzen 7 7800X3D in games? We put the two CPUs head-to-head.

title: Enthusiast fixes 30-year issue with S3 graphics card — hacking the VBIOS fixes black levels by scalpelling out the Virge DX’s ‘pedestal bit’
summary: A retro hardware enthusiast has demonstrated a fix that eliminates the washed-out appearance people witness when using 1990s graphics cards from S3.

title: KTC H27P3 27-inch 5K dual-mode gaming monitor review: Incredible pixel density and flexibility
summary: KTC delivers tremendous pixel density with its H27P3. It’s a 27-inch IPS panel with 5120x2880 5K at 60 Hz, 2560x1440 QHD at 120 Hz, Adaptive-Sync, HDR and wide gamut color. It’s color accurate out of the box and delivers a lot of flexibility.
